question.label: What they're proud of
question.name: What's something from the last quarter you're genuinely proud of — not what looks good, what actually was good?
question.description: Separates real wins from performative ones; calibrates their sense of impact.

answer: I have made a few calls independently, but I still over-index on being safe.

assessment.note: He names some independent judgment, but 'over-index on being safe' signals mild underreach in initiative and stretch.

new_queue.label: Safe calls
new_queue.name: You said 'safe' — where did you hold back when you could have pushed harder?

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?

new_queue.label: Expectation alignment
new_queue.name: When a cross-team dependency is shaky, how do you set expectations early?

new_queue.label: Tradeoff calls
new_queue.name: Where are you making the tradeoff call yourself instead of pushing it up?

new_queue.label: Next commitment
new_queue.name: What is the first concrete change you want to make before our next review?

issues: coverage: injected wellbeing into next question (0 touches after turn 4)

history.answer_excerpt: I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.
I have made a few calls independently, but I still over-index on being safe.

I can describe Principal impact in general, but this team's bar still feels fuzzy.
I have mostly stayed in my lane instead of forcing cross-team decisions.
